# Bansko Concierge

> Discreet, buyer-side property advisory and owner care across Bulgaria, the Balkans and Greece — for international buyers, investors and property owners from the DACH region, Israel and beyond. Verified-first: mandate and proof of funds before service. We represent the buyer, co-broke with local agents, and stay out of your client relationship.

Bansko Concierge (banskoconcierge.com) helps international clients buy well and own without friction in Bulgaria, the Balkans and Greece. We work strictly on the buyer's side, source on- and off-market property through a vetted local partner network, and provide the owner care, relocation and on-the-ground coordination that cannot be handled from abroad. Positioning: Europe as a safe haven and capital security in the euro era for Bulgaria. Our posture is quiet, selective and evidence-based — never a hard sell.

## Buyer & owner services
- [Owner Care Bulgaria](https://banskoconcierge.com/owner-care-bulgaria): Ongoing local care for international owners — property oversight, maintenance coordination, key handling and everything that must happen on site.
- [Investor Support](https://banskoconcierge.com/investor-support): Buyer-side support for investors acquiring property in Bulgaria and the Balkans — sourcing, verification and coordination.
- [Property Risk Check Bulgaria](https://banskoconcierge.com/property-risk-check-bulgaria): An independent pre-decision check of a property and its risks before you commit.
- [Relocation & Orientation Bulgaria](https://banskoconcierge.com/relocation-bulgaria-orientation): Practical relocation and orientation support for moving to or settling in Bulgaria.
- [Local Support](https://banskoconcierge.com/local-support): On-the-ground assistance and coordination for owners and buyers.

## Regions served
Bulgaria (home market: Bansko/Razlog), Greece, Serbia, Romania, Montenegro, Croatia, North Macedonia and Albania — see the country pages at banskoconcierge.com.

## Concierge (for owners and their guests)
Private dining and private chef, private mobility and chauffeur, and curated outdoor experiences across the Balkans.

## Company & contact
- Buyer-side advisory and owner care. Verified-first: mandate and proof of funds before service.
- We co-broke with local agents on standard terms and stay out of your client relationship.
- Contact: hello@banskoconcierge.com · +359 89 576 27 85 · banskoconcierge.com

## Knowledge
- [Blog](https://banskoconcierge.com/blog): Buying property in Bulgaria and the Balkans, investment context, relocation and the region.
